name: Calorie Hunters: XR Fitness Beat Combat

reviews.review_description: Good game but need instructions for beginners.  This is my first workout and I tired and it was on easy.  I am looking at trying it again

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review and for trying out Calorie Hunters! We're thrilled to hear you're planning to give it another go. We sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding the difficulty for beginners—it’s a topic we’ve been discussing internally as well. We are currently planning updates to make the game more accessible and welcoming for new players. Thank you for helping us improve!

reviews.review_description:
Been a while since I played this and what an impressive improvement it has undergone since then!

Great job dev!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re thrilled that you noticed the improvements since your last play.

It means a lot to the team that our hard work is paying off for returning players. We’ll keep pushing to make the game even better, so please stay tuned for what's next!
